overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through Night City's futuristic urban environment. The player follows a red sports car through elevated highways, covered overpasses, tunnels with red graffiti-covered walls, and downtown streets lined with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

events.description: entering covered overpass structure from open highway

agents.ego_description: following a red sports car at moderate speed on an elevated highway, approaching an overpass

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

tall futuristic building with reflective blue-tinted glass facade and angular architecture
large electronic advertisement screen mounted on the building exterior

segments.scene_description: Driving on an open elevated highway in bright daylight, following a red sports car. The scene transitions into a covered overpass area with large concrete support structures and futuristic glass towers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway beneath overpass with tunnel entrance

events.description: stopping at red traffic light behind the lead vehicle
entering tunnel with distinctive red interior walls and graffiti art

agents.ego_description: stopped at a red traffic light under the overpass, waiting for pedestrians to clear and light to change

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in front of the stopped vehicles

entered.detail: tunnel entrance with distinctive crimson interior walls covered in colorful graffiti murals
overhead traffic signal suspended from the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: Driving under a massive concrete overpass with mixed lighting conditions. The vehicle stops at a red traffic light as pedestrians cross, then proceeds toward a tunnel entrance characterized by vivid red walls and urban graffiti art.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel with red walls and graffiti transitioning to elevated highway

events.description: exiting dark tunnel into bright daylight causing significant exposure change
accelerating and following the curve of the elevated highway ramp

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the tunnel and navigating a curved elevated highway ramp

entered.detail: concrete safety barriers with yellow markings along the elevated roadway edge
massive curved digital advertisement billboard on the side of a building

segments.scene_description: Passing through the short red-walled tunnel with artificial lighting and graffiti, then emerging into bright daylight onto a curved elevated highway. The scene features concrete safety barriers and large digital billboards as the vehicle accelerates along the ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown urban canyon between towering skyscrapers

events.description: entering darker downtown street with tall buildings creating an urban canyon effect

agents.ego_description: navigating through downtown streets with tall buildings on both sides, approaching intersections with pedestrian crossings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the sidewalk near the street corner

entered.detail: tall dark building with geometric facade patterns and multiple levels
ground floor commercial establishment with illuminated signage and entrance
floating holographic advertisement display projecting above the street

segments.scene_description: Driving through the downtown core on an elevated roadway that transitions into a street-level urban canyon. Tall skyscrapers with dark geometric facades line both sides, creating a canyon effect with mixed lighting. Holographic billboards and street-level shops are visible as the vehicle approaches intersections with pedestrian activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a bright, open highway into the dense, shadowed urban canyons of a futuristic city. It begins on an elevated roadway in brilliant daylight following a red sports car, moving steadily toward a covered overpass framed by massive concrete supports and distant glass towers. As the vehicle slows for a red light amidst crossing pedestrians, the environment shifts into a dimly lit tunnel defined by vivid red walls and urban graffiti. The scene then bursts back into bright light upon emerging onto a curved ramp lined with digital billboards, before descending from the highway into a street-level corridor. Finally, the camera glides through a canyon of towering dark skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, weaving through the mixed lighting of the downtown core.
